title: Rural Hospital Stabilization Grants Act
bill_text: A BILL To establish temporary operating grants for at-risk rural hospitals and require service continuity plans.

expected_effects: Short-term financial stabilization for critical access facilities
Improved continuity of emergency and maternity services
Increased state oversight and reporting workload

title: Freight Port Emissions Transition Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund zero-emission cargo equipment and require phased emissions reduction plans for major ports.

expected_effects: Lower local air pollution near port corridors
Capital transition costs for operators
Potential operational efficiency gains from newer equipment

title: Public School Facilities Safety Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund structural safety inspections and remediation in high-risk K-12 buildings.

expected_effects: Safer learning environments in older facilities
Short-term disruption during remediation work
Increased demand for certified inspection and repair services

title: Community Pharmacy Access Act
bill_text: A BILL To support independent pharmacy sustainability in underserved regions through dispensing and service support grants.

expected_effects: Improved medication access in pharmacy deserts
Temporary fiscal support for financially fragile providers
Additional state program administration requirements

title: Floodplain Buyout Modernization Act
bill_text: A BILL To modernize voluntary floodplain buyout programs and streamline relocation assistance.

expected_effects: Reduced long-term disaster exposure for participating households
Administrative workload for local relocation planning
Potential reduction in repetitive federal disaster payouts

title: Secure Federal Identity Infrastructure Act
bill_text: A BILL To upgrade federal identity verification infrastructure with phishing-resistant authentication standards.

expected_effects: Lower account takeover risk in government systems
Implementation costs for legacy-system migration
Procurement opportunities for compliant identity platforms

title: Rail Crossing Safety Improvement Act
bill_text: A BILL To reduce rail crossing collisions through signal modernization and local hazard mitigation grants.

expected_effects: Fewer crossing incidents over time
Construction disruptions during signal upgrades
Higher local planning and grant management activity

title: Maternal Care Workforce Expansion Act
bill_text: A BILL To expand scholarships and loan repayment for obstetrics providers serving shortage areas.

expected_effects: Improved provider availability in underserved regions
Increased federal spending on workforce incentives
Potential long-term reductions in maternal care gaps

title: Municipal Lead Service Line Acceleration Act
bill_text: A BILL To accelerate lead service line replacement with milestone-based federal grants.

expected_effects: Reduced lead exposure risk in affected communities
Large near-term capital and workforce demand
Improved long-term public health outcomes

title: Emergency Communications Continuity Act
bill_text: A BILL To strengthen backup power and network redundancy for local 911 and emergency communications centers.

expected_effects: Higher resilience during power and network outages
Upfront infrastructure spending for redundancy upgrades
Lower risk of emergency call service disruptions
